title: Sour Gooey Ethiopian Chickpea Stir-fry
description: A show-off ethiopian dish featuring green chillies with a slow-cooked, low-calorie-friendly blend of sour and gooey flavors.

ingredients.name: onions
ingredients.notes: About 3 tbsp of onion juice should be extracted later

ingredients.name: garlic
ingredients.notes: For added flavor and extra health benefits

ingredients.name: ginger
ingredients.notes: To add a subtle hint of spice and flavor

ingredients.name: apple cider vinegar
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's at room temperature to prevent chilling

ingredients.name: honey
ingredients.notes: To enhance the sour and gooey flavors

instructions: Heat a pan over medium-high heat. Add onions, garlic, and green chillies.
Cook until onions are translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in tomato paste, cooking for another minute.
Add tomatoes (optional), ginger, apple cider vinegar, and honey to the pan.
Mix well, bring to a boil then reduce heat to low. Simmer for about 20-25 minutes.
Pour out half of the mixture into a blender and blend until smooth.
Return blended mixture back to the pot, add chickpeas, and mix well.
Simmer for another 10 minutes while stirring occasionally.
Serve hot. Adjust seasoning if needed.
